race.comment: MOUSSAKA (1) lengthened nicely in the lane second-up when closing off sharply into the placings. Nearing peak now and should appreciate the added trip. Holder sticking adds to confidence. SHAMASTAR (4) has given bold sights in his last two but hasn't been able to go on with it. Drops back sharply in trip fourth-up and will prove tough to reel in if left alone in front. MANDARIN (7) bas been mixing her form this prep but turned in a better effort last time when holding onto a minor placing at Casterton. If she can hold her form she can give this a big shake. OR AM I (9) has struggled to threaten since resuming but strips fitter fourth-up and faces one of her easiest assignments so far. Draws the A1 and looks one of the main chances after some key scratchings.
